name: Toolbar redesign demo
description: A tiny local draft for iterating on the variant toolbar. The `media` axis is deliberately sparse — `illustration` is only demonstrated under the `calm` theme — so the sparse/auto-route behaviour has something to chew on.

axes.name: theme
axes.label: Theme
axes.description: Overall visual temperament of the hero — calm vs loud vs editorial.

choices.name: calm
choices.label: Calm
choices.description: Soft neutrals, generous whitespace, understated type.

choices.name: bold
choices.label: Bold
choices.description: High-contrast dark canvas with a single saturated accent.

choices.name: editorial
choices.label: Editorial
choices.description: Serif-forward, magazine-style with rules and captions.

axes.name: media
axes.label: Media
axes.description: What fills the hero's visual slot.

choices.name: illustration
choices.label: Illustration
choices.description: Flat vector illustration — only demonstrated under the Calm theme, so it is unreachable from Bold/Editorial by flipping one axis.

pages.description: Canonical combination — the toolbar's home base.
Dark page — tests the light/paper bar's contrast over a dark hero.
The only page with media=illustration. Selecting Illustration from Bold/Editorial must auto-route here and also flip Theme to Calm.
